element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Starting weapon with 6-round capacity; establishes baseline accuracy and reload mechanics
Upgraded revolver variant; increased stopping power without changing core mechanics
Faster firing rate than revolver; introduces ammo efficiency concept
High damage, wider spread; useful for clustered enemies and environmental threats
High rate of fire and damage; requires precision to avoid civilian casualties
One-time use weapon; extremely high fire rate for critical situations
One-time use weapon; area-of-effect damage for boss encounters
Visual identification requirement (barefaced) vs. masked enemies; affects rank progression and score
Must distinguish from enemies; shooting them causes rank demotion/loss
Isolated boss arenas with face-exposed antagonists; tests weapon mastery and accuracy

typical_tension_triggers: Weapon loss (reversion to revolver after being shot)
Rank demotion risk from friendly fire
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Wave-based escalation with cumulative weapon power progression; tension driven by identification pressure (civilian/officer/enemy distinction) rather than environmental hazards; relief tied to successful rank maintenance and weapon upgrades

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Destructible environmental targets yield bonus points (10 each); non-essential but score-rewarding

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to weapon handling and civilian/enemy distinction in The Bank Robbery; manageable enemy density with clear visual differentiators
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased enemy density and variety in Chinatown/Downtown Assault and The Hijacking; weapon upgrades provide scaling difficulty accommodation
difficulty_curve.late_game: Chemical Plant Sabotage and boss encounters require precision fire control and weapon selection strategy; one-use weapons introduce resource management pressure
notable_spikes: Boss encounters at stage ends (isolated combat, no civilians to avoid)
Late-stage enemy density increases requiring sustained accuracy
Submachine gun/grenade launcher availability signals final challenge escalation

notable_level_patterns.description: Each stage intersperses armed enemies (masked/sunglasses) with unarmed civilians and allied officers (barefaced). Player must maintain accuracy discipline to preserve rank.
Each stage introduces access to new weapon tier; losing life reverts to revolver, creating progression reset risk and incentivizing weapon retention strategy
Final encounter in each stage removes civilian/officer presence, allowing full aggression and creating distinct mechanical shift from main stage flow
Rank promotion tied to flawless civilian protection; demotion on friendly fire creates persistent performance metric independent of enemy kills
